title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Exports useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled from client/my-sites/plugins/hooks/use-is-marketplace-redesign-enabled.ts
1.2: Returns false from useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled when a site is selected
1.3: Returns true from useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled for logged-out users without a site selected
1.4: Returns true from useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled for hosting dashboard opt-in users without a site selected
1.5: Returns false from useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled when the feature flag is disabled
1.6: Adds an enabled prop to FullWidthSection at client/components/full-width-section/index.jsx
1.7: Defaults FullWidthSection to returning children without wrapping when enabled is omitted
1.8: Accepts an isMarketplaceRedesignEnabled parameter in getCategories at client/my-sites/plugins/categories/use-categories.tsx

1.9: Varies all 9 getCategories category fields (paid title, paid description, popular title, featured title, featured description, monetization title, monetization description, business title, business description) based on the isMarketplaceRedesignEnabled parameter

1.10: Replaces all 14 pre-existing direct isEnabled('marketplace-redesign') call sites (full-width-section/index.jsx, categories/index.tsx, use-categories.tsx, education-footer/index.tsx, plugin-details-header/index.jsx, plugin-details.jsx, plugins-browser-item/index.jsx, collection-list-view/index.tsx, plugins-browser/index.jsx, single-list-view/index.jsx, plugins-category-results-page/index.jsx, plugins-discovery-page/index.jsx, plugins-search-results-page/index.jsx, related-plugins/index.tsx) with useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled
1.11: Converts both static module-level flag-dependent constants (COLLECTION_LIST_LENGTH in collection-list-view/index.tsx, SHORT_LIST_LENGTH in single-list-view/index.jsx) into runtime computations
1.12: Enables the marketplace-redesign feature flag in the config
1.13: Adapts the Browse plugins link rendering in client/dashboard/plugins/plugins-menu/index.tsx based on the marketplace-redesign feature flag
2: Documentation Maintainability
2.1: Documents the visibility conditions near useIsMarketplaceRedesignEnabled
3: Artifact Cleanup

3.1: Removes all 13 isEnabled imports from '@automattic/calypso-config' (including full-width-section/index.jsx, categories/index.tsx, use-categories.tsx, education-footer/index.tsx, plugin-details-header/index.jsx, plugin-details.jsx, plugins-browser-item/index.jsx, collection-list-view/index.tsx, ...) where isEnabled was only used for the marketplace-redesign check
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Adds an isMarketplaceRedesignEnabled parameter to getFirstCategoryFromTags in client/my-sites/plugins/categories/use-categories.tsx
